package rulecoverage

func NegativeGormJoinsPlusPreloadPlusFindWithoutLimit() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_joins_plus_preload_plus_find_without_limit"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "GORM chains combining Joins, Preload, and unbounded Find on request paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
